name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
fix(sync): hysteresis drift correction to reduce playbackRate flicker

Replace the single 40ms deadzone with separate enter/exit thresholds
(0.3s/0.1s) so rate correction starts and stops as discrete bursts
instead of continuously nudging playbackRate away from 1x on every
tiny drift. Update docs to match.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
